title: OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW HILLSBORO MAIN STREET OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Outpatient Mental Health Services provide therapy, mental health assessments, treatment planning, medication management, skills training, and consultation. Community-based services may also be provided as needed. 1340 E Main Street Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 597-6089 Main phone For follow-up calls (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Intake Toll-free Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 597-6089 For follow-up calls Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Blue MAX line to Stop 9842, north on 12th, right on Main Street (2-minute walk) Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Guidance Medication Information/Management Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STRENGTHENING FAMILIES PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW HILLSBORO MAIN STREET
